'''shalawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumocystiasis|pneumocystiasis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-l-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumocystiasis|pneumocystiasis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shalawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shælæwæth|shælæwæth]] || [[word:shælæwæj|shælæwæj]] || [[word:shælæwæsh|shælæwæsh]] || [[word:shælæwæ|shælæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shalalawath|shalalawath]] || [[word:shalalawaj|shalalawaj]] || [[word:shalalawash|shalalawash]] || [[word:shalalawa|shalalawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shalawath|shalawath]] || [[word:shalawaj|shalawaj]] || [[word:shalawash|shalawash]] || [[word:shalawa|shalawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shalafwath|shalafwath]] || [[word:shalafwaj|shalafwaj]] || [[word:shalafwash|shalafwash]] || [[word:shalafwaf|shalafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shalawatha|shalawatha]] || [[word:shalawaja|shalawaja]] || [[word:shalawasha|shalawasha]] || [[word:shalawaka|shalawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shalawath|shalawath]] || [[word:shalawaj|shalawaj]] || [[word:shalawash|shalawash]] || [[word:shalawa|shalawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shalawathal|shalawathal]] || [[word:shalawajal|shalawajal]] || [[word:shalawashal|shalawashal]] || [[word:shalawakal|shalawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shalawathatha|shalawathatha]] || [[word:shalawajaja|shalawajaja]] || [[word:shalawashasha|shalawashasha]] || [[word:shalawaka|shalawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shalawathan|shalawathan]] || [[word:shalawajan|shalawajan]] || [[word:shalawashan|shalawashan]] || [[word:shalawakan|shalawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shalawathaoro|shalawathaoro]] || [[word:shalawajaoro|shalawajaoro]] || [[word:shalawashaoro|shalawashaoro]] || [[word:shalawakaoro|shalawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
